channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vaccine Alliance Addresses Kennedy's Concerns
item.description: Gavi, the global vaccine alliance, informed the U.S. government Thursday it will accelerate its transition away from shots containing thimerosal, a mercury-based preservative.

item.title: New Lawsuits Challenge Trump's $1.8 Billion 'Weaponization' Fund
item.description: A coalition of President Donald Trump's critics and former federal officials filed new lawsuits Friday seeking to block payments from the administration's...

item.title: Iran Diplomacy Tense as Mediators Work to Prevent New Attacks
item.description: Mediators scrambled Friday to salvage a framework for renewed U.S.-Iran talks and prevent possible American or Israeli military action, as President...

item.title: Way harder than it should be: Why Congress may reject $1.7B compensation fund
item.description: Senate Republicans withdrew their ICE and Border Patrol funding bill after backlash over a $1.776 billion compensation fund created without congressional approval.
